Contact Brush Dental in Sherwood Park

Gentle, Stress-Free Dentistry in Sherwood Park

Brush Dental is your trusted partner for compassionate dental services in Sherwood Park. We proudly offer a full range of dental care for children, adults, and seniors, including preventative care, cosmetic treatments, restorative procedures, and more. Our experienced team is committed to delivering high-quality care in a warm, welcoming environment, providing you and your family with a positive and stress-free dental experience. Whether you're visiting for a routine checkup or a complete smile transformation, we’re here to offer the support you need.

Book a Consultation

Reach out to us and let us help you and your family achieve a healthy, confident and happy smile.
